Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Bank Act (use of word ГўВЂВњbankГўВЂВќ, ГўВЂВњbankerГўВЂВќ or ГўВЂВњbankingГўВЂВќ)
Identification.RunningHead: Bank Act (use of word ГўВЂВњbankГўВЂВќ, ГўВЂВњbankerГўВЂВќ or ГўВЂВњbankingГўВЂВќ)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Bank Act to authorize the use of the words ГўВЂВњbankГўВЂВќ, ГўВЂВњbankerГўВЂВќ and ГўВЂВњbankingГўВЂВќ by credit unions and caisses populaires that are provincially regulated.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Subsection 983(2.1) of the Bank Act is replaced by the following:

Subsection.MarginalNote: Unauthorized use of word ГўВЂВњbankГўВЂВќ, ГўВЂВњbankerГўВЂВќ or ГўВЂВњbankingГўВЂВќ
Subsection.Text: Subject to the regulations and subsections (4) to (5.1), (6) and (12), every person, other than a bank or a credit union or caisse populaire incorporated or organГ‚В­ized by or under an Act of the legislature of a province, who uses the word ГўВЂВњbankГўВЂВќ, ГўВЂВњbankerГўВЂВќ or ГўВЂВњbankingГўВЂВќ to indicate or describe a business in Canada or any part of a business in Canada, without being authorized to do so by this Act or any other Act of Parliament, is guilty of an offence.
